description.en: Full platform control including system configuration
description.fr: Contrôle total de la plateforme y compris la configuration système
description.it: Controllo completo della piattaforma inclusa la configurazione di sistema

description.en: Moderate restaurants, manage content, handle support
description.fr: Modérer les restaurants, gérer le contenu, traiter le support
description.de: Restaurants moderieren, Inhalte verwalten, Support bearbeiten
description.it: Moderare ristoranti, gestire contenuti, gestire supporto

description.en: Handle customer issues, view orders, process refunds
description.fr: Traiter les problèmes clients, voir les commandes, traiter les remboursements
description.de: Kundenprobleme bearbeiten, Bestellungen ansehen, Erstattungen bearbeiten
description.it: Gestire problemi clienti, visualizzare ordini, elaborare rimborsi

description.en: Full control over own restaurant(s), menu, orders, and staff
description.fr: Contrôle total sur son/ses restaurant(s), menu, commandes et personnel
description.de: Volle Kontrolle über eigene(s) Restaurant(s), Menü, Bestellungen und Personal
description.it: Controllo completo sui propri ristoranti, menu, ordini e personale

description.en: Manage incoming orders, update menu availability
description.fr: Gérer les commandes entrantes, mettre à jour la disponibilité du menu
description.it: Gestire ordini in arrivo, aggiornare disponibilità menu

description.en: Pick up and deliver orders to customers
description.fr: Récupérer et livrer les commandes aux clients
description.de: Bestellungen abholen und an Kunden liefern
description.it: Ritirare e consegnare ordini ai clienti

description.en: Pick up and deliver orders to customers
description.fr: Récupérer et livrer les commandes aux clients
description.de: Bestellungen abholen und an Kunden liefern
description.it: Ritirare e consegnare ordini ai clienti

description.en: Browse restaurants, place orders, leave reviews
description.fr: Parcourir les restaurants, passer des commandes, laisser des avis
description.de: Restaurants durchsuchen, Bestellungen aufgeben, Bewertungen hinterlassen
description.it: Sfogliare ristoranti, effettuare ordini, lasciare recensioni
